productDisplayName: Nike Women Glide White Pink Shoe
description: GLIDE THROUGH DAILY RUNS An update of the most successful nike LunarGlide series, the nike LunarGlide 2 running shoes is one of the most advanced running shoes you can ever find in the market. One of the most responsive shoes for people of all types of gaits, the LunarGlide performs excellently even under tough conditions besides looking absolutely stylish. This makes it an ideal shoe for a wide range of runners, including underpronators and overpronators. An all-rounder for all runners The Nike LunarGlide 2 is engineered with extra cushioning across the length of the shoe, with special focus on the areas of the foot that need that extra support and comfort. This makes the LunarGlide 2 a hot favourite among runners who prone to impact related injuries as it not only enhances shock absorption, but also provides a solid base that helps you spring with every stride. The LunarGlide 2 has a Lunarlon system in the midsole that adds on a plush cushioning to absorb shock protecting the feet, besides adding that extra spring in gait. This adapts to your running style and offers complete support, making it one of the safest running shoes to pick especially if you are not too sure what kind of a gait you have. The Nike LunarGlide 2 shoes are constructed with a lot of mesh on the upper to ensure ample ventilation for the feet and keep them dry and comfortable even during long runs. The shoeliner is employed with a unique climate control system that keeps the shoe itself dry and fresh wicking away moisture, ensuring that your feet are free from blisters. On the whole, the stylish design and comfort factor together have always kept the Nike LunarGlide range of shoes at the top of the priority and favourite list of runners the world over. Upper Breathable mesh upper with Flywire technology and bonded seams for improved support Lace-up closure for a secure Fit Reflective elements for enhanced visibility Cushioned sock liner for superior shock absorption Synthetic knit laces for longevity Midsole Lunarlon midsole provides extra cushioning and comfort Outsole Flex grooves on the outsole enables flexibility of the feet Non-marking rubber outsole helps provide traction and durability Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
